StructurePhase.Reference: Sun K., Yuan X., Wu E., Chen D., Gou C., Physica B, v385/ p141-143 (2006)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1014646. Sample Preparation: STARTINGMATERIALS: Ti (powder), Mo (powder). COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon. THERMALTREATMENT: annealed at 1173 K for 72 h. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Article Title: Neutron diffraction study of the deuterides of Ti-Mo alloys. Minor Warning: No R factors reported/abstracted. Minor warning from the LPF Editor exist. No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
